creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Walter unless updating to 3.3.4 is *required* to fix this issue, please update attachment 174493 to *only* address the build failure (leaving out the update to 3.3.4), as bug 209132 already covers the version update.

If 3.3.4 is infact *required* to fix the issue reported here, then this issue can continue to depend on bug 209132, but its attachments should be obsoleted, in favour of those in bug 209132
